case_title: JEFFREY STEWART JR VS. CHARNELL SAFAYE BAKER

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,532.49 FILED BY STEWART JR, JEFFREY AS TO DEFENDANT BAKER, CHARNELL SAFAYE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-19-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF STEWART JR, JEFFREY
TRIAL RESET TO NOV-28-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF OCT-19-2018 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-28-2018 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STEWART JR, JEFFREY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAKER, CHARNELL SAFAYE $3,192.49 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,267.49, I CREDIT PLAINTIFF'S TESTIMONY THAT HE WAS IN THE INTERSECTION WHEN THE ACCIDENT OCCURRED. UNDER VC21800, DEFENDANT IS LIABLE. I AWARD PROPERTY DAMAGE ($3017.49), TOWING ($95), LOSS OF USE (4 DAYS ONLY, $80) AND COURT COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $75.00 - SERVED NOV-12-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BAKER, CHARNELL SAFAYE
DECLARATION ADDRESS UPDATE SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT BAKER, CHARNELL SAFAYE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-28-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-28-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF JEFFREY STEWART JR. IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHARNELL SAFAYE BAKER IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS 4 DAYS UNTIMELY. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
